meta.title: Features — ClassAuto
meta.description: Tour ClassAuto's nine core capabilities on a single page. From a single slide deck to learner-level analytics, in one continuous flow.

hero.title: From one slide deck to learner-level analytics — in one flow
hero.subtitle: ClassAuto is nine modules wired together. You don't pick one — you turn the platform on and the whole pipeline starts working.

morph.title: One PowerPoint → one ready-to-share lecture video
morph.subtitle: Upload a PowerPoint as-is and the platform extracts text, drafts a script, runs dual-language TTS and renders a HeyGen avatar — slide by slide, with your approval at each step. About twelve minutes from upload to share.
morph.altMorph: Morph animation: a slide rectangle gradually becomes a video play icon

modules.title: Four modules, one system
modules.subtitle: Content · Assessment · Analytics · Operations — four modules sharing the same data plane. Hover the card to see them split apart.
modules.altModuleQuad: Four module cards (Content, Assessment, Analytics, Operations). On hover they slide apart in four directions.

cards.title: Nine things you can already do in beta
cards.subtitle: Each card mirrors the one-line description from the README. Detailed specs live in the planning docs.

pipeline.title: PPT → video pipeline
pipeline.desc: Upload deck → extract text → Claude-drafted script → TTS (ElevenLabs / Google) → HeyGen avatar.

assess.title: Assessment
assess.desc: Claude AI authors multiple-choice and short-answer items. Formative checks during the lecture, summative after.

session.title: Learning sessions
session.desc: Six-stage state machine, real-time progress tracking, CSV export.

attention.title: Attention monitoring
attention.desc: Heartbeat-based tracking. The lecture pauses automatically when the learner stops responding.

rag.title: RAG-scoped Q&A
rag.desc: pgvector finds the relevant slides, Claude answers using only the lecture's own material — off-topic questions are declined.

billing.title: Subscriptions
billing.desc: Stripe-powered Basic and Pro plans, with usage caps and automatic receipts.

translate.title: Translation
translate.desc: DeepL + Google Cloud Translate convert the lecture script into other languages.

i18n.title: Bilingual UI
i18n.desc: Korean and English (next-intl). Student-side multilingual UI lands during the semester.

dashboard.title: Instructor dashboard
dashboard.desc: Attendance, accuracy, engagement and cost in one place — with one-click CSV export.

progress.title: Each learner's progress, traced in a single line
progress.subtitle: A learning session walks a six-stage state machine. When the bar reaches 100% the completion check is drawn automatically.

iso.title: One lecture's data — laid out on one isometric plane
iso.subtitle: Attendance · accuracy · engagement · cost — four signal types compared on the same grid. The grid drifts gently as you scroll.
iso.altGrid: Isometric visualisation showing attendance, accuracy, engagement and cost signals distributed across a grid

cta.title: Start with a single slide deck
cta.subtitle: Try one lecture first, see what it does to your class, then expand a step at a time.
